audit_items.proof_trace: The inner comparison `if (updatedAt < dataFeedUpdatedAt)` at L390 directly implements `use_feed iff dataFeedUpdatedAt > streamsUpdatedAt`; the outer staleness gate at L385 ensures the feed path is only entered when streams is stale. Tests `test_getAssetPrice_WithDataFeedAsLeastStalePrice` and `test_getAssetPrice_WithDataStreamsAsLeastStalePrice` both confirm the most-recent-wins behaviour. Ties resolve to Data Streams, consistent with the documented priority.
